product_overview: BBVA Talent is a frontend platform for discovering talent, composing SDA project teams, and exploring workforce intelligence across BBVA. It helps managers build recommended teams, employees find mentors or peers, and stakeholders review explainable talent insights, all using mock data in the demo build.
core_goals: Compose a recommended team for an SDA project based on roles, skills, availability, Trust Score, EDI, B-Tokens, and prior collaboration
Search for individual talent and review ranked candidate results with explainable match details
Refine project recommendations through Spanish conversational filters
Compare selected candidates side by side and explore their collaboration graph
Browse networking and mentoring profiles, request mentoring or connect with peers, and view employee profiles
Inspect workforce intelligence dashboards and technical whitepaper content
Use onboarding guidance, theme switching, export options, and deep links to share or revisit demo experiences

features.name: Onboarding Tour
features.description: A first-visit guided tour that introduces the main home page entry points and persists completion so it does not reopen automatically.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Wait for the tour backdrop to appear -> Observe the first guided step -> Advance through the remaining steps -> Close the tour -> Refresh the page and see the tour remain closed
Navigate to / -> Open the tour again from the home navigation -> Review the guided steps again -> Close the tour

features.name: Demo Mode and Deep-Link Auto-Load
features.description: A demo entry path that loads a canonical SDA project and sends the user directly to the recommended team results, including direct deep links by project code.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select the demo project CTA -> Wait for the loading animation to finish -> See the project results view with coverage, gaps, and recommended roles populated
Navigate to /?demo=SDA-53024 -> Observe the project results view load directly for the matching demo project
Navigate to /?demo=NOT-A-CODE -> Observe the URL is ignored and remain on the home view
Navigate to /?demo=SDA-99999 -> Observe an error toast indicating the project was not found and remain on the home view

features.name: Project Composer
features.description: A filterable list of SDA projects where the user can inspect a selected project and request a team recommendation from its role requirements.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Project Composer -> Type a search term to filter the project list -> Select a project -> Review its details in the sticky panel -> Request team recommendations -> See the project results view
Navigate to / -> Open the Project Composer -> Type a search term with no matches -> Observe the empty state -> Clear the search to restore the list -> Select a project

features.name: Project Results and Team Recommendation Review
features.description: A recommended team workspace that shows coverage, gaps, role assignments, candidate rows, comparison selection, audit details, refinement, and export actions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a project through the demo flow or composer -> Observe coverage score, total skills, and gaps rendered immediately -> Expand a gap card to read its severity and recommendation -> Review the candidate rows by role
Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Select at least two candidates -> Observe the comparison bar appear -> Deselect candidates and see the comparison bar update
Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open a candidate audit modal -> Review the explainable score breakdown -> Close the modal -> Open the candidate's full profile

Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open the refinement drawer -> Enter a valid Spanish refinement command -> Observe the filters and team metrics update -> Remove a filter chip -> Reset all filters to restore the original team
Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open the export menu -> Choose to print the page -> Choose to copy the summary -> Choose to copy the deep link

features.name: Free-form 1-to-1 Search
features.description: An inline talent search entry on the home page that lets the user search for candidates by query and review ranked results.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the search input -> Type at least three characters -> Submit the search -> Wait for the loading animation to finish -> See ranked candidate results
Navigate to / -> Open the search input -> Select a suggestion chip to fill the query -> Submit the search -> Review the ranked results
Navigate to / -> Open the search input -> Type fewer than three characters -> Observe that submission remains disabled

features.name: Refinement Chat
features.description: A conversational drawer that applies deterministic Spanish filters to the current project recommendation and recomputes team metrics live.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open the refinement drawer -> Enter a command asking for Kafka skills -> See a filter chip appear and coverage update -> Enter a second command excluding vacation availability -> See the second filter chip appear

Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open the refinement drawer -> Enter a command requiring Senior and Staff levels -> See the level filter chip appear -> Remove one chip individually -> Reset all filters to restore the original result
Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open the refinement drawer -> Enter an unrecognized command -> Observe an unknown response in the chat

features.name: Why Candidate Audit Modal
features.description: An explainability modal that breaks down a candidate's match score into six factors and links to the candidate's full profile.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open a candidate audit modal -> Review the score summary and factor breakdown -> Close the modal -> Open the full profile link
Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Open a candidate audit modal -> Press Escape to close the modal

features.name: Candidate Comparison
features.description: A side-by-side comparison modal for two to four selected candidates, including shared skills and a shortcut to the team constellation view.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Select two to four candidates -> Open the comparison view -> Review the side-by-side grid and shared skills -> Open the constellation view -> Close the modal
Navigate to / -> Open a project results view -> Select candidates -> Open the comparison view -> Press Escape to close it

features.name: Team Constellation
features.description: A full-screen collaboration graph for the selected team, with sidebar navigation among members and highlighted graph focus.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a project results comparison -> Open the team constellation -> Select a member from the sidebar -> Observe the graph highlight update -> Close the modal

features.name: Individual Constellation View
features.description: A personal graph view for one candidate that shows their profile details and collaborator network, with the ability to pivot to another collaborator.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open a candidate from search or project results -> Open the 360 view -> Review the candidate profile and graph -> Select a collaborator node -> Observe the graph switch focus -> Go back to the previous view

features.name: Networking and Mentoring
features.description: A networking workspace for finding mentors, peers, and mentees, including capacity-aware mentor actions and profile navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Networking -> Switch between all profiles, mentors, peers, and mentees -> Search by name, skills, or topics -> Open a mentor with full capacity -> Observe the full-capacity panel -> Open a mentor with available capacity -> Request mentoring -> See the B-Tokens balance update and confirmation
Navigate to / -> Open Networking -> Click a peer profile -> Connect with the peer -> Open the profile view for that person -> Return with the browser back button and see the networking view restored

features.name: Candidate Profile Deep Link
features.description: A dedicated employee profile page with trust, token, and EDI information, plus collaborator links to other profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /candidate/emp_001 -> See Valentina Rios load in the profile page -> Review bio, skills, project history, and trust/EDI details
Navigate to /candidate/no_existe -> Observe the friendly 404 state
Navigate to /candidate/emp_001 -> Select a collaborator from the profile -> Navigate to that collaborator's profile

features.name: About Whitepaper
features.description: A static technical whitepaper page that explains the architecture, data flow, and compliance model.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Arquitectura -> Scroll through the presentation, intelligence, and data layers -> Review the component status badges -> Read the compliance section

features.name: Workforce Intelligence Dashboard
features.description: An aggregate dashboard for workforce risk, demand-supply, and technology distribution insights, with expandable risk cards and theme switching.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Review the AI headline insight and KPI cards -> Inspect the workforce-by-type summary -> Expand a silo risk card -> Review demand-supply, availability, and seniority charts -> Toggle the theme -> Refresh and see the chosen theme persist
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click back -> Return to the previous route or the home page if there is no history

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: A persistent theme switcher that changes the application between dark and light modes.
user_flows: Navigate to / or /dashboard -> Toggle the theme -> Refresh the page -> See the selected theme persist
Navigate to / or /dashboard -> Clear local storage -> Refresh the page -> See the default theme restored

routes.description: Home with state machine of 7 internal views (home, searching, results, constellation, project-composer, project-results, networking). Renders ImpactMetrics, SuccessStories, RoiCalculator, OnboardingTour, ParticleBackground, ThemeToggle. Accepts query param ?demo=SDA-XXXXX for deep-link auto-load.
Whitepaper with 3 architecture layers (Presentation, Intelligence, Data), components with status (live/mock/planned), 6-step data flow, compliance section.

Deep-linkable individual employee profile. Hero card, bio, skills, project history, clickable collaborators, aside with TrustScoreBadge full + BTokenBadge full + EDIPanel full, networking tags. Friendly 404 state for non-existent ids.

Workforce Intelligence dashboard. AI headline insight, KPI strip (4 cards), workforce-by-type strip (Legacy/Proprietary/Modern/Emerging), TechDistributionBarChart, SiloRiskCard list (6-rule heuristic), DemandSupplyChart, AvailabilityDonut, SeniorityPyramid, TechCard grid.

features.name: Onboarding Tour (auto-open on first visit)
features.description: 3-step guided tour with backdrop, spotlight ring, auto-positioned tooltip. Persists completion in localStorage key bbva-talent:onboarding-seen-v1.
user_interactions: Wait ~700ms after first visit for the tour backdrop to appear
Click forward arrow to advance to step 2
Click forward arrow to advance to step 3
Click Finalizar to close the tour
Press Escape at any time to close the tour
Click ? button in the home nav to re-open the tour

features.name: Demo mode and deep-link auto-load
features.description: Pre-loads a canonical SDA project (FX Tracker SDA-53021) and navigates to project-results. Also accepts /?demo=SDA-XXXXX URL param matching the regex ^SDA-\d+$.
user_interactions: Click the Prueba un caso real CTA on home (SDA-53021 FX Tracker)
Wait for SearchingAnimation to finish
See project-results view with coverage, gaps, team balance and roles populated
Visit /?demo=SDA-53024 directly to deep-link into Fraud Detection AI
Visit /?demo=NOT-A-CODE and observe URL is ignored (regex no match)
Visit /?demo=SDA-99999 (invalid code) and observe error toast Proyecto SDA-99999 no encontrado

features.name: Project Composer
features.description: Browse and select one of 30 SDA projects with role definitions and required quantities. Filterable list with sticky detail panel and empty state.
user_interactions: Click Project Composer CTA on home
Type into search input to filter the project list
Click any project to select it and see its detail in the sticky panel
Click Buscar equipo or equivalent CTA to request recommendations
Click Limpiar busqueda in empty state when filter has no matches
Click the back button to return to home

features.name: Project Results — recommended team
features.description: Recommended team for the selected project with CoverageRing, total skills, GapAnalysisPanel (6 rules), TeamBalancePanel, role sections with candidate rows, multi-select for comparison, refinement chat, and export menu.
user_interactions: Observe coverage_score, total_skills and gaps computed at mount
Expand a GapAnalysisPanel card to read severity and recommendation
Toggle a candidate checkbox to add to comparison selection
See floating bar appear Comparar lado a lado (N) when N is at least 2
Click ? on a candidate row to open WhyCandidateModal
Click 360 on a candidate row to view their constellation graph
Click Refinar con IA to open the refinement chat drawer
Click the back button to go back to project-composer

features.name: Free-form 1-to-1 Search
features.description: Free text search opens an inline input on home; submits when input has at least 3 characters. Shows SearchingAnimation then ResultsView with candidates ordered by score.
user_interactions: Click Buscar perfil CTA to expand the search input
Type a query (must be at least 3 chars to enable submit)
Click a suggestion chip to fill the input
Press Enter or click Buscar button to submit
Wait for SearchingAnimation to finish
See ResultsView with candidate cards ordered by score
Click 360 on any candidate to view their constellation graph

features.name: Refinement Chat (Spanish conversational filters)
features.description: Side drawer chat that parses Spanish (neutral and Argentine voseo) into 5 filter types — excludeSquads, excludeAvailability, requireSkills, excludeLevels, requireLevels. Filter chips removable individually; coverage and gaps recompute live via useMemo.
user_interactions: From project-results, click Refinar con IA to open the drawer
Type que tengan Kafka and submit; see filter chip and coverage update
Type sin nadie de vacaciones to add a second chip
Type solo Senior y Staff to set requireLevels
Type quita los de Pagos to add an excludeSquads filter
Click the X on a filter chip to revert that single filter
Type vuelve al equipo original to clear all filters and reset
Type a non-recognized command to trigger an unknown message bubble

features.name: Why Candidate Modal (score auditability)
features.description: Modal explaining a candidate's match score with a 6-factor breakdown (Skills 30, Trust 25, Availability +-12, Domain experience 15, Collaborations 10, EDI 8). Footer with link to /candidate/[id] and GDPR Art. 22 note.
user_interactions: Click ? on any candidate row in project-results to open the modal
Read the human summary and warnings (e.g. vacation flag)
Inspect the 6 factor bars and their textual recommendations
Press Escape or click outside to close the modal
Click Ver perfil completo to navigate to /candidate/{id}

features.name: Candidate Comparison
features.description: Full-screen modal that compares 2 to 4 selected candidates side by side. Shared skills (intersection of skill sets) highlighted with green check. Top stats strip (match avg, total unique skills, shared skills, available now). Button to open Team Constellation.
user_interactions: In project-results, select 2 to 4 candidates via checkboxes
Click the floating Comparar lado a lado bar
See the comparison grid with shared skills highlighted
Click Constelacion to open TeamConstellation modal
Press Escape to close the comparison modal

features.name: Team Constellation (graph)
features.description: Full-screen modal with force-directed graph showing team members, skills (top 4 per person plus shared), and collaboration edges. Sidebar with clickable members and 4-metric stats strip.
user_interactions: From comparison modal, click Constelacion
Click any member in the sidebar to highlight them in the graph
Press Escape to close the modal

features.name: Constellation View (individual)
features.description: 50/50 layout view with full candidate info on the left and force-directed personal graph on the right. Mobile stacks sidebar above graph. Clicking a collaborator in the graph loads that person's graph.
user_interactions: From results or project-results, click 360 on a candidate
See the candidate full info on the sidebar and their graph
Click any collaborator node in the graph to switch focus
Click the back button to return to the previous view

features.name: Networking and Mentoring
features.description: Browse mentor / peer / mentee profiles with filter chips and search box. ProfileCards show capacity badges for mentors (e.g. 2/2 mentees). Mentors at full capacity render a FullCapacityPanel with next availability date. Wallet badge in header shows B-Tokens balance and tier; CTA cost displayed in BT.
user_interactions: Click Networking in the home nav
Toggle the filter between Todos / Mentores / Peers / Mentees
Type into search input to filter by name, skills or topics (300ms debounce)
Click a mentor with full capacity to see Cupo de mentoria completo panel and Notificarme cuando se libere button
Click a mentor with capacity to Solicitar mentoria — verify B-Tokens decrement and toast appears
Click a peer to Conectar
Click the round Ver perfil icon-button to navigate to /candidate/{id}
Press the browser back button and verify the Networking view is restored from sessionStorage

features.name: Candidate Profile (deep-link)
features.description: Deep-linkable employee profile at /candidate/[id]. Hero card, bio, skills with bars, project trajectory with quarters, clickable collaborators, aside with TrustScoreBadge full + BTokenBadge full + EDIPanel full, networking tags. Loading skeleton on entry, friendly 404 for missing ids.
user_interactions: Visit /candidate/emp_001 directly and confirm Valentina Rios profile loads
Visit /candidate/no_existe and observe friendly 404 state
Click any collaborator in the aside to navigate to /candidate/{collaboratorId}
Read TrustScoreBadge full breakdown (manager / EDI / peers / tenure / skills)
Read EDIPanel full with rating, manager_comment and peer_comments

features.name: About / whitepaper
features.description: Static technical whitepaper page with 3 architecture layers, components with live/mock/planned status, 6-step data flow, and compliance section.
user_interactions: Click Arquitectura in the home nav to navigate to /about
Scroll through the 3 architecture layers (Presentation / Intelligence / Data)
Verify each component card has its correct status badge

features.name: Workforce Intelligence Dashboard
features.description: Aggregate workforce dashboard. AI headline insight derived from highest-severity silo, KPI strip (Headcount, Silos at risk, Coverage, Mentors), workforce-by-type strip (Legacy / Proprietary / Modern / Emerging), TechDistributionBarChart, SiloRiskCard list with 6-rule heuristic (bus-factor, succession, tenure-concentration, no-pipeline, demand-supply, low-mentorship), DemandSupplyChart, AvailabilityDonut, SeniorityPyramid, TechCard grid, ThemeToggle in header.
user_interactions: Click Dashboard in the home nav to navigate to /dashboard
Read the AI headline insight
Verify the 4 KPI cards display computed values
Verify the 4 workforce-type cards show counts and percentages
Expand a SiloRiskCard to read its detected factors and AI suggestions
Inspect DemandSupplyChart, AvailabilityDonut and SeniorityPyramid
Click ThemeToggle in the header and verify the page re-renders in the new theme
Click the back button to return to the previous route (or / if no history)

features.name: Theme toggle (light / dark)
features.description: Toggle between dark and light themes. Persists choice in localStorage. Applies CSS variables on the html element. Should not flash unstyled content on page load.
user_interactions: Click ThemeToggle on home or dashboard to switch themes
Refresh the page and verify the chosen theme persists
Clear localStorage and refresh — verify default theme (dark) is applied

features.name: Export team (print, copy, deep-link)
features.description: Dropdown in project-results header with three actions — Print/PDF (window.print() with @media print CSS), Copy summary (formatted plain text to clipboard), Copy deep-link (origin + ?demo=SDA-XXXXX to clipboard).
user_interactions: In project-results, click the export menu dropdown
Click Imprimir / PDF and observe the browser print dialog opens
Click Copiar resumen and verify clipboard contains formatted plain text and a confirmation appears
Click Copiar deep-link and verify clipboard contains origin/?demo=SDA-XXXXX

features.name: Error handling and edge cases
features.description: Robust error handling — search submit disabled for query under 3 chars, ErrorBoundary global, ErrorToast for failed API calls, friendly 404 on missing candidate, deep-link with bad regex ignored silently, deep-link with non-existent code shows toast.
user_interactions: Type fewer than 3 chars in search input and observe the submit button stays disabled
Visit /?demo=SDA-99999 and observe the error toast
Visit /?demo=foo (invalid pattern) and observe the URL is ignored without error
Trigger an artificial render error and observe the ErrorBoundary fallback with Volver al inicio / Recargar

known_limitations.issue: Mock-only — IS_MOCK defaults to true; the app never hits a real backend in this build
known_limitations.impact: All API calls are simulated locally; no network traffic to localhost:8000 should occur

known_limitations.issue: Refinement Chat does NOT use a real LLM
known_limitations.impact: Conversational refinement is a deterministic Spanish parser over alias dictionaries (SQUAD, SKILL, LEVEL, AVAILABILITY); behavior is fully predictable for tests

known_limitations.issue: PDF export uses window.print(), not a JS PDF library
known_limitations.impact: There is no programmatic Save as PDF — tests should validate that the print dialog is invoked, not that a file is produced
npx tsc --noEmit returns the known error TS2561 about testPathPattern; do NOT treat this as a regression

known_limitations.issue: Playwright E2E tests are NOT implemented
known_limitations.impact: Only Jest unit tests exist; full end-to-end is part of the future roadmap

known_limitations.issue: README.md and CHANGELOG.md are out of date
known_limitations.impact: They do not list /dashboard, ThemeToggle, or the mentor capacity model in Networking; testsprite-prd.md at repo root is the authoritative spec

known_limitations.issue: Heavy components are dynamically imported with ssr disabled
known_limitations.impact: ParticleBackground, SearchingAnimation, ResultsView, ConstellationView, TeamComposerView, ProjectResultsView, NetworkingView render only on the client

known_limitations.issue: Onboarding tour persistence uses a versioned localStorage key
known_limitations.impact: The key is bbva-talent:onboarding-seen-v1; tests that need a fresh tour must clear this key explicitly

known_limitations.issue: Networking view persists across the /candidate/[id] round-trip via sessionStorage
known_limitations.impact: Only home and networking are restored; other internal views reset to home when the page remounts
